allow: Bash(psql -U postgres -d Aina -c 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f""{r.get\(''''similarity'''',0\):.4f} | {r.get\(''''title'''',''''?''''\)[:60]}""\) for r in data.get\(''''results'''',[]\)]")
Bash(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(content_embedding\) as has_content, COUNT\(clip_embedding\) as has_clip FROM items;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT id, title, type, embedding_status, LEFT\(url, 50\) as url FROM items ORDER BY created_at;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT id, name, source, item_count FROM clusters ORDER BY name;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d Aina -c "TRUNCATE items, item_clusters, item_tags, clusters, tags, insights, cluster_runs CASCADE;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d Aina -c "TRUNCATE item_clusters, item_tags, clusters, insights, cluster_runs CASCADE;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM item_clusters UNION ALL SELECT count\(*\) FROM clusters UNION ALL SELECT count\(*\) FROM insights;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d Aina -c "\\dt" -c "SELECT EXISTS \(SELECT FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'items'\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "TRUNCATE items, item_clusters, item_tags, clusters, tags, insights, cluster_runs, arena_cache CASCADE;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT 'items' as tbl, count\(*\) FROM items UNION ALL SELECT 'clusters', count\(*\) FROM clusters UNION ALL SELECT 'tags', count\(*\) FROM tags UNION ALL SELECT 'insights', count\(*\) FROM insights;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT id, type, title, embedding_status, content_embedding IS NOT NULL as has_content_emb, clip_embedding IS NOT NULL as has_clip_emb, ai_caption IS NOT NULL as has_caption FROM items ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT i.id, i.type, i.title, c.name as cluster_name FROM items i LEFT JOIN item_clusters ic ON i.id = ic.item_id LEFT JOIN clusters c ON ic.cluster_id = c.id ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT count\(*\) as total, count\(content_embedding\) as with_emb, count\(search_text\) as with_search FROM items;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT id, title, left\(ai_caption, 80\) as caption FROM items LIMIT 5;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U postgres -d Aina -c "SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'items' AND column_name = 'search_text';")
